Short CV

Asst. Prof. Emine Yağmur ZORBOZAN graduated from Eskişehir Osmangazi University Faculty of Medicine in 2013. She completed her medical specialty education in University of Health Sciences Erenköy Psychiatric Hospital Department of Psychiatry in 2019.
